steps.title: Spot what the colon reveals about the influence
steps.content: The colon introduces an example: tourists visiting the Santa Fe Depot can easily recognize the Spanish architectural influence. This shows the influence is visible and clearly noticeable throughout the state.

steps.title: Match the influence's perceived quality
steps.content:
”Palpable” means easily perceived or felt—the example shows tourists immediately recognize the Spanish influence, confirming it's obvious throughout the state.

The other choices fail: corroborated describes confirmation rather than perceptibility; disputed and understated contradict the easy recognition shown in the example.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
